name: landing-page-experiments
description: A/B test backlog generator for landing pages. Scored 10-20 test prioritization grouped by element and hypothesis type. Always fetches fresh LP summary. Reads prior CRO audits to avoid suggesting fixes already shipped. Reads brand kit so variant copy stays on-brand.

installs.purpose: Local routing index for saved experiment backlogs

Global INDEX.md routing entry for the experiment-backlog library. The skill itself is auto-discovered via Runneth's available-skills mechanism and is intentionally not indexed (per Runneth's rule: do not index /agent/.agents/skills/).

changelog.notes: Added post-install intro. After install completes, Runneth surfaces a short 'what just opened up + try this now' message sourced from post-install-intro.md.

Initial PR-ready release. Six-phase method producing a scored A/B backlog (lift x win-rate / effort), reads prior audits + brand kit, dedupes carried-forward tests, and saves to artifacts + durable history.

post-install.name: Introduce the new capability
post-install.description: Read post-install-intro.md from this use case folder. After all prior install and post-install steps complete, surface the file's sections to the user in chat as the closing message of the install turn: '## What just opened up' as prose, '## Try this now' as a numbered prompt list, '## Compounds with' only when present and at least one named use case is installed in the sandbox. Resolve any {{TOKEN}} placeholders using the same customize map applied during install.
